questions.subject: Construction Materials & Management
questions.stem: The initial setting time of ordinary Portland cement (as per IS) should not be less than
questions.solution:
**Concept.** IS limit: initial set ≥ 30 min; final set ≤ 600 min.

**Working.**
$30$ min.

**Answer.** $30$ minutes

questions.subject: Construction Materials & Management
questions.stem: The workability of fresh concrete is commonly measured by the
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Slump cone test measures workability.

**Working.**
Slump test.

**Answer.** Slump test
